content: Yeah, just grind and lose your soul on traphase <:please:1356053110375714817>

Yo huge shoutout to this team. I play draft so I don't really know standard teams, but I shot up from 1300 to 2400 in a few hours before the weekly reset with this comp and it absolutely rolls any pickman comps. Tons of fun to pilot!
I think I only lost maybe a game or two along with climb
Actually just went back and counted and it was a 12-1 WR
Like i said the team bullies noobs
That and Goliath is just kinda busted
Nothing is impossible with Helot and gun's cry (usually)
hi, does this mean that every week we only get rewards for the highest rank in PDive/All Pick/Draft Pick? and we don't get rewards 3 times from each leaderboard?
yes
it's so that you can play whichever mode suits you the most
and do not need to be rushed and take too much time playing all 3 modes
Also now the rewards are better
It used to be mats for arc 2
And people had to pvp for leaderboard ranking in order to get it
They changed it so it's only gold and the tickets for emote / icon profile
oooooh i see i see 😄 thanks for the explanation guys!
